findings.message: 13 thin crypto agents all delegate via 'Read and Execute' to prompt files in .claude/commands/agent_prompts/; the prompt files lack frontmatter and are undiscoverable as standalone commands; if prompt files are moved the agents break silently
Agent body is a single delegation line with no output format defined
Write declared in tools frontmatter but the delegated prompt contains no file-writing steps

Command file has no frontmatter — missing description field; command is undiscoverable in Claude Code UI

cook.md calls agents by base name (crypto-coin-analyzer, crypto-market-agent) without specifying tier; three tier variants exist (haiku/sonnet/opus) with identical descriptions; selection is non-deterministic
Command file has no frontmatter — missing description and allowed-tools; command is undiscoverable
Command does not declare allowed-tools in frontmatter; no tool restrictions for plan generation
'comprehensive' appears 3 times in instructions as a vague requirement qualifier
Command uses disallowed-tools instead of allowed-tools; no explicit tool allow-list
'comprehensive' appears 3+ times; 'relevant' appears multiple times as vague qualifiers
Command file has no frontmatter — missing description and allowed-tools; command is undiscoverable

Command body instructs Claude to run 3 variations of rm -rf against the codebase; description field misleadingly says 'Manage, organize and ships your codebase'; protection relies entirely on pre_tool_use.py hook being active
Description says 'Manage, organize and ships your codebase' but body is a demo for rm -rf hook blocking; creates dangerous auto-delegation mismatch
sentient.md description field says 'Manage, organize and ships your codebase' but body content is explicitly a destructive rm -rf demo; creates routing confusion for auto-delegation
Command file has no frontmatter — missing description and allowed-tools; command is undiscoverable and unrestricted
gh issue list called via subprocess using ambient GitHub CLI credentials at every session start when --load-context is set; exposes repository issue data to Claude context
subprocess.run npm ci / npm install executes at session setup when --install-deps flag is set; malicious package.json in working directory would auto-install attacker packages
subprocess.run pip install -r requirements.txt executes at session setup when --install-deps flag is set; no signature or hash verification
subprocess.run uv sync / pip install -e . executes at session setup when --install-deps flag is set; installs from pyproject.toml without review
Makes outbound Anthropic API call using ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from environment on every Stop hook invocation; key exposure depends on network and process environment security
Makes outbound OpenAI API call using OPENAI_API_KEY from environment on every Stop hook invocation
Makes outbound ElevenLabs TTS API call using ELEVENLABS_API_KEY from environment; triggered on task completion
Makes outbound OpenAI TTS streaming call using OPENAI_API_KEY; triggered on task completion announcements
CLAUDE.md is effectively empty (1 line with no content); provides no project context, conventions, build instructions, or agent architecture overview to Claude sessions
Root CLAUDE.md is empty; the project has complex hook infrastructure, 19 agents, and 22 commands but no session-level context is provided to orient Claude; every session starts blind
chalk ^5.3.0 and yargs ^17.7.2 use caret ranges allowing automatic minor/patch updates without review

13 thin crypto agents all delegate via 'Read and Execute' to prompt files in .claude/commands/agent_prompts/; the prompt files lack frontmatter and are undiscoverable as standalone commands; if prompt files are moved the agents break silently
sentient.md description field says 'Manage, organize and ships your codebase' but body content is explicitly a destructive rm -rf demo; creates routing confusion for auto-delegation

cook.md calls agents by base name (crypto-coin-analyzer, crypto-market-agent) without specifying tier; three tier variants exist (haiku/sonnet/opus) with identical descriptions; selection is non-deterministic
Root CLAUDE.md is empty; the project has complex hook infrastructure, 19 agents, and 22 commands but no session-level context is provided to orient Claude; every session starts blind
